diagrams.title: Dictionary File Reading Flow
diagrams.description: Flow diagram showing the process of reading and processing a Unix dictionary file
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the step-by-step process of dictionary file reading in C programming, including error handling at each stage

diagrams.title: Memory Layout for Dictionary Reading
diagrams.description: Diagram showing how memory is used when reading a dictionary file
elements: Arrow: buffer content changes with each read
Text: O(1) memory usage with streaming
diagrams.purpose: Demonstrate that reading dictionaries line-by-line uses constant memory, making it suitable for large files

diagrams.title: Word Comparison Process
diagrams.description: Shows how words from input are compared against dictionary words
diagrams.purpose: Illustrate the preprocessing steps needed for accurate dictionary word matching
